task_status_legend.not_started: Defined but not selected to run yet.
task_status_legend.pending: Selected/queued as the next task to run.
task_status_legend.in_progress: Currently being worked on (only one task at a time).
task_status_legend.in_review: Implementation done, going through the review loop.
task_status_legend.blocked: Cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
task_status_legend.failed: Review/release loop exceeded max rounds without passing; stopped and reported.
task_status_legend.passing: All DoD met, required verification passed, evidence recorded.

definition_of_done: Required verification ran and passed (./init.sh / scripts/verify-harness.sh).
Evidence recorded (command output, commit SHA, or file path) — not just a claim.
Security guardrails in .claude/ were not weakened.

tasks.title: Permissions, dangerous-command hook, secret hooks, pre-commit guard
requirements: Restrict tool permissions to an allow/ask/deny list and self-protect the config.
Block dangerous Bash commands before execution.
Warn on secrets in edited files and block committing secrets.

tasks.title: Phase 0: real init.sh verification + hierarchical state schema
requirements: init.sh runs a real, runnable verification (not placeholders).
feature_list.json supports feature -> task hierarchy with status, dod, evidence, review/release rounds.
evidence: ./init.sh exit 0, RESULT: PASS — harness is healthy

tasks.title: /idea command: research, analyze, ask clarifying questions, split into tasks
requirements: Turn a user request into confirmed, grouped tasks written into state.

tasks.title: /spec /plan /work /review (loop <=3) /release commands + orchestrator
requirements: Chain stages; review/release loop until pass or max 3 rounds then stop and report.

features.title: Size Finder Shopify app (theme app extension)

tasks.title: recommendSize() core logic, fully TDD
requirements: Exact match, fit adjustment, out-of-range estimate, input validation.

dod.criterion: Vitest suite passes (exact, validation, out-of-range, fit, custom-chart)

tasks.title: Theme app block + widget UI
requirements: App block renders button + modal; calls recommendSize; reads merchant chart (metafield) with fallback; matches prototype.

dod.criterion: shopify app build succeeds (theme check + bundle)

evidence: shopify app deploy -> version 'fit-confidence-1' Active on dev dashboard (Omegatheme Dev, 2026-06-29)
tasks.notes: UI matches docs/features/size-finder/prototype/. Released (deployed) — version fit-confidence-1 active. Live storefront preview via shopify app dev (operator). Admin editor = Phase 2.

tasks.title: Admin Polaris size-chart editor (metafield)
requirements: Merchant edits chart in admin; stored in shop metafield; storefront widget uses it.

dod.criterion: validateChart() pure validation, TDD (valid / min>max / missing-size / negative-NaN / non-array)
dod.evidence: app/app/size-chart.validate.{js,test.js}; npm test -> 16/16 green (5 new + 11 existing)
extensions/size-finder/assets/sizing.test.js 'uses a custom chart, not a hardcoded one'

dod.criterion: storefront theme block reads shop metafield with fallback to built-in default
embedded React Router app scaffolded + consolidated (theme extension + size-chart modules under one app)
dod.evidence: commit b504597; app/ is the embedded RR app; shopify app build OK; npm test 16/16

dod.criterion: admin Polaris route edits chart, validates, saves to metafield; storefront-readable definition auto-created
dod.evidence: app/app/routes/app.size-chart.jsx + ensureSizeChartDefinition (storefront PUBLIC_READ); GraphQL validated vs Admin schema; react-router build compiles route (20 modules)

dod.criterion: admin<->storefront live demo: edit chart in admin -> metafield -> widget recommends differently
dod.evidence: PENDING operator: run `shopify app dev` against dev store, edit M range, Save, confirm storefront widget changes + capture demo

evidence: app/app/routes/app.size-chart.jsx — Polaris web-components editor; app.jsx nav; shopify.app.toml scopes=write_metafields
commits b504597 (re-scaffold/consolidate) + <feat admin route>; react-router build OK; ./init.sh RESULT: PASS, npm test 16/16, shopify app build OK
tasks.notes: Phase 2 implementation COMPLETE & build-verified: embedded React Router app (re-scaffolded via `shopify app init`, connected to existing Fit Confidence app, flattened to app/), admin Polaris size-chart editor, idempotent storefront-readable metafield definition, theme block reads it with fallback. ONLY REMAINING = the live admin<->storefront demo, which needs the operator to run `shopify app dev` against the dev store (auth + running tunnel). Stays in_progress until that demo is captured; then -> passing. If the dev run errors on access scope, confirm scopes=write_metafields took effect (re-grant on next `shopify app dev`).
